interactions.description: Increased risk of bleeding. Aspirin inhibits platelet function and warfarin inhibits clotting factors.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination unless specifically indicated. Monitor INR closely if used together.

interactions.description: Risk of lactic acidosis. Contrast media can cause acute kidney injury, reducing metformin clearance.
interactions.recommendation: Stop Metformin 48 hours before and after contrast procedures.

interactions.description: Hyperkalemia risk. ACE inhibitors reduce aldosterone, causing potassium retention.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor potassium levels regularly. Avoid potassium supplements unless indicated.

interactions.description: Amiodarone increases digoxin levels by 70-100%, risk of toxicity.
interactions.recommendation: Reduce digoxin dose by 50% when starting amiodarone.

interactions.description: Increased risk of myopathy/rhabdomyolysis.
interactions.recommendation: Limit simvastatin to 20mg daily when used with amlodipine.

interactions.description: Ciprofloxacin inhibits theophylline metabolism, causing toxicity.
interactions.recommendation: Reduce theophylline dose by 30-50% or use alternative antibiotic.

interactions.description: NSAIDs reduce methotrexate clearance, increasing toxicity risk.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid NSAIDs or monitor methotrexate levels closely.

interactions.description: Omeprazole reduces clopidogrel effectiveness via CYP2C19 inhibition.
interactions.recommendation: Use pantoprazole instead of omeprazole.

interactions.description: Risk of serotonin syndrome - potentially fatal.
interactions.recommendation: Contraindicated. Wait 14 days between medications.

interactions.description: NSAIDs reduce lithium excretion, increasing toxicity risk.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor lithium levels if NSAID use is necessary.

interactions.description: Fluconazole inhibits warfarin metabolism, increasing INR significantly.
interactions.recommendation: Reduce warfarin dose by 25-50%, monitor INR closely.

interactions.description: Increased statin levels, risk of rhabdomyolysis.
interactions.recommendation: Temporarily stop statin or use azithromycin instead.

interactions.description: Risk of serotonin syndrome and lowered seizure threshold.
interactions.recommendation: Use with caution, monitor for symptoms.

interactions.description: Severe hypotension - can be fatal.
interactions.recommendation: Absolute contraindication. Never use together.

interactions.description: Carbamazepine reduces contraceptive effectiveness.
interactions.recommendation: Use higher dose OCP or alternative contraception.

interactions.description: Disulfiram-like reaction: nausea, vomiting, flushing.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid alcohol during and 48 hours after treatment.

interactions.description: Complex interaction - both drugs affect each other's levels.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor levels of both drugs.

interactions.description: Hyperkalemia risk - both drugs increase potassium.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor potassium levels weekly initially.

interactions.description: QT prolongation, risk of fatal arrhythmias.
interactions.recommendation: Contraindicated combination.

interactions.description: Rifampin dramatically reduces OCP effectiveness.
interactions.recommendation: Use additional barrier contraception.
